title: Normie mode claims tool effects despite strict prompt
root_cause: consciousness.txt Never-Mime-Tool-Use section lacked a per-case refusal table. Groq improvised and sometimes produced 'I've stored...', 'saved to L3', fake MODE banners.

fix.description: Added NORMIE MODE REFUSAL TABLE with exact phrases for: 'remember X', 'what did I tell you about Y', 'run code', 'search for X', 'switch to root'. Removed all web_search references (C-009). Added MEMORY_READ QUERY FORMATION RULES (C-008). Rewrote system.txt from 19 thin lines to structured Groq context with mode explanation, tool list, and matching refusal table.

verification.syntax_check: python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('prompts/consciousness.txt').read())" — N/A (not Python); reviewed manually
